name: Scallop and Pine Nut Sauce with Spaghettini A
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the scallops and remove any tough tendon on one side. Dry well on paper towels.
2. In a large saucepan or flame-proof casserole, heat the oil over moderately low heat. Add the garlic and cook until softened but not browned, about 3 minutes.
3. Add the pine nuts to the pan and increase the heat to moderate. Cook, stirring frequently, until the nuts are lightly browned, about 2 minutes. Remove from the heat and season with half a teaspoon of salt and all of the pepper.
4. Bring a large pot of water to boil. Add the remaining two tablespoons of salt and the spaghettini. Cook the pasta until al dente, 8 to 10 minutes.
5. Add the scallops to the garlic and pine nut sauce. Cook over high heat, tossing frequently, until the scallops are just opaque throughout, about 2 to 3 minutes.
6. Remove from the heat and season with an additional pinch of salt and pepper. Drain the pasta, add it to the scallops and toss. Add the melted butter and basil and toss again. Serve hot.
Makes 6 to 8 servings.
